settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the application
settings.subtitle: Manage account settings and preferences.
settings.emailReadonly: The email address cannot be changed.
settings.passwordDescription: Change your password regularly to protect your account.
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email updates about your account.
settings.marketingEmailsDesc: Receive emails about new features and updates.
settings.twoFactorDesc: Manage additional security layer for your account.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Deleting your account permanently removes all data, including inventory, tools and vehicle stocks. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action is irreversible. All data will be permanently deleted — inventory, tools, vehicle stocks, delivery notes and your subscription.
settings.deleteAccountSupport: Contact support to delete your account:

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage the members of {org}.
team.inviteDescription: Enter the email address of the person you want to invite. If they don't have an account yet, they will receive a registration link.
team.adminCanManage: Admins can invite and manage members.
team.permissionDesc: Defines which areas the person can access.
team.addedToTeam: {email} has been added to the team.
team.allMembersDesc: All people who have access to this organisation.
team.noOrgFound: No organisation found. Please create an organisation first.

settings.rolesDesc: Control what members in {org} can see and do.
settings.systemRolesReadonly: System roles are read-only. Only custom roles can be deleted.
settings.alertsDesc: Configure automatic alerts for low stock and due maintenance.
settings.channelsDesc: Choose how you want to be notified.
settings.thresholdsDesc: When should an alert be triggered?
settings.brandingDesc: Customize your organisation's colours and logo
settings.colorsDesc: Choose the primary and accent colour for your organisation
settings.logoDesc: Upload your organisation's logo (PNG, SVG, max 500 KB)
settings.integrationsDesc: Connect Zentory with your existing tools — accounting, ERP, fleet management, hospital systems and more.
settings.missingToolDesc: We prioritise integrations based on demand. Tell us what you need.
settings.noPluginsFound: No plugins found matching your filters.
settings.sessionsDesc: Manage all signed-in devices and browsers.
settings.dataRetentionDesc: Configure retention periods for historical data.
settings.emailInboxDesc: Automatically parse supplier emails and create drafts.
settings.scheduledReportsDesc: Reports are automatically sent via email as CSV.
settings.scannerSubtitle: Configure hardware barcode scanner detection in keyboard wedge mode.
settings.scannerDetectionDesc: Control how Zentory responds to barcode scanner input.
settings.scannerEnabledDesc: Fast keyboard input is automatically detected as a barcode scan.
settings.scannerSoundDesc: A short confirmation tone is played with each detected scan.
settings.scannerAutoLookupDesc: After scanning, the barcode is automatically looked up in the database.
settings.testScannerDesc: Scan a barcode to test detection. Do not click into an input field — the scanner is only detected when no text field is focused.
settings.scannerDisabled: Scanner detection is disabled. Enable it above.
settings.compatibleScannersDesc: Zentory supports all common USB and Bluetooth scanners in keyboard wedge mode.
settings.scannerNoteText: Any USB or Bluetooth scanner operating in keyboard wedge mode is supported. Make sure your scanner is configured to send an Enter key after each scan.
settings.printerSubtitle: Configure your label printer for material, tool and location labels.
settings.connectionDesc: How is your printer connected to the computer?
settings.webUsbNotice: WebUSB is only supported in Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
settings.webBluetoothNotice: Web Bluetooth is only supported in Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
settings.labelSizeDesc: Select the size of the labels you use.
settings.testPrintDesc: Print a test label to verify the configuration.
settings.noPrinterConnected: No printer connected. Press "Print test label" to establish a connection.
settings.rfidSubtitle: Configure the connection to your UHF RFID reader for automatic tag detection and inventory tracking.
settings.connectionTypeDesc: Choose how your RFID reader is connected to Zentory.
settings.keyboardWedgeDesc: The reader types the EPC code like a keyboard. Works automatically with the existing scanner system.
settings.networkWsDesc: Connection to a fixed reader via the local network through a WebSocket endpoint.
settings.keyboardWedgeModeDesc: Your RFID reader operates in HID mode and types the EPC code like a keyboard. Detection runs automatically via the existing scanner system. Make sure the reader sends an Enter key after each tag read.
settings.tagLogDesc: Recently read RFID tags in real time.
settings.scanRfidTag: Scan an RFID tag with your handheld reader.
settings.tagsAutoDetected: Tags are automatically detected once they are in range.
settings.assignTagDesc: Assign an EPC code to a material, tool or location.
settings.supportedReadersDesc: Zentory supports all common UHF RFID readers.
settings.rfidNoteText: In keyboard wedge mode, any UHF RFID reader that sends the EPC code as keyboard input is supported. For network readers, a local gateway agent is required that translates the LLRP protocol into WebSocket events.
settings.keypadSubtitle: Configure the key mapping of your programmable keypad or function keys for quick warehouse actions.
settings.quickKeysDesc: Enable or disable function key detection.
settings.quickKeysEnabledDesc: Function keys (F1-F12) trigger warehouse actions when no input field is focused.
settings.keyMappingDesc: Assign a warehouse action to each function key.
settings.learnModeDesc: Press a key on your keypad to see which key code is received. Useful for diagnosis and configuration.
settings.pressAnotherKey: Press another key or stop learning mode.
settings.pressAnyKey: Press any key on your keypad.
settings.compatibleDevicesDesc: Programmable keypads and keyboards that work with Zentory.
settings.keypadNoteText: Any USB keypad that can send function keys (F1-F12) is supported. Program your physical keys to send the desired F-keys. Most keypads come with configuration software.
settings.ipSubtitle: Restrict organisation access to specific IP addresses.
settings.ipWarningDesc: Incorrect configuration can lock you and your team out! Make sure your current IP address is in the list before enabling the restriction.
settings.addIpDesc: Enter a single IPv4 address or a CIDR range (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24).
settings.ipLoadError: IP list could not be loaded.
settings.retentionPeriodsDesc: Define how long historical data should be retained. Older entries are automatically deleted during cleanup.
settings.commentsDesc: Comments on materials, tools and orders
settings.entriesOlderThan: Entries older than {count} months will be deleted during cleanup.
settings.autoCleanupDesc: When enabled, old data is automatically cleaned up according to the configured periods.
settings.autoCleanupToggleDesc: Old data is automatically deleted daily.
settings.cleanupConfirmDesc: All data older than the configured periods will be irrevocably deleted. {count} data category(ies) affected. This action cannot be undone.
settings.noRetentionConfigured: Currently no retention periods are configured — all data is retained indefinitely.
settings.twoFactorActiveDesc: Your account is protected with an additional security factor.
settings.disable2faWarning: Disabling 2FA reduces the security of your account.
settings.disable2faConfirmDesc: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication. All recovery codes will be deleted.
settings.recipientsHint: One email address per line or separated by comma.
settings.minOneEmail: At least one valid email address required.
settings.avatarOnlyFormats: Only JPEG, PNG and WebP are allowed.
settings.avatarMaxSize: The image must not exceed 2 MB.
settings.newPwMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
settings.pwMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
settings.automationsDesc: Define rules that automatically send emails, create tasks or block checkouts — triggered by events in Zentory.
settings.templatesDesc: Start with a predefined template or create your own rule. Templates can be customised after activation.
settings.noRulesHint: Activate a template or create your own rule.
settings.deleteRuleDesc: This automation rule will be permanently deleted.
settings.ruleFormDesc: Define when and what should happen automatically. Use {{fieldname}} for dynamic values.
settings.noConditions: No conditions — rule fires on every event.
settings.ruleTestDesc: Simulates the rule with sample data. No real actions are executed.
settings.ruleTestPrompt: Click Start test to check conditions with typical sample data.
settings.conditionsMatched: All conditions met — actions would fire.
settings.rulesLoadError: Automation rules could not be loaded.
settings.webhooksDesc: Receive real-time events in Zapier, Make or custom systems. Zentory sends signed POST requests for each event.
settings.signatureDesc: Each request includes the X-Webhook-Signature header. Compute HMAC-SHA256(secret, body) and compare the hex digest.
settings.noWebhooksHint: Create a webhook to send events to Zapier, Make or your own system.
settings.webhookCreatedDesc: Copy the secret now — it will only be shown once.
settings.secretHint: Use this secret to verify the X-Webhook-Signature (HMAC-SHA256).
settings.newWebhookDesc: Enter receiving URL and select events.
settings.deleteWebhookDesc: The webhook will be permanently deleted. No further events will be sent.
settings.intPageDesc: Connect Zentory with your existing tools — accounting, ERP, fleet management, hospital systems and more.
settings.intMissingToolDesc: We prioritise integrations based on demand. Tell us what you need.
settings.intCatAccountingDesc: Material consumption directly in invoices and quotes
settings.intCatConstructionDesc: Track material flow directly in construction projects
settings.intCatHealthcareDesc: Lot numbers, expiry dates and medical device tracking
settings.intCatFleetDesc: Automatically derive vehicle location from GPS position
settings.intCatCommunicationDesc: Reorder levels, overdue tools and bookings as push notifications
settings.intCatHardwareDesc: Integrate physical labels and scanners directly
settings.emailSetupDesc: Forward supplier emails to your personal Zentory address to automatically recognise orders, delivery notices and invoices.
settings.emailStep1: Set up email forwarding with your supplier or email provider
settings.emailStep2: Incoming emails are automatically analysed by AI
settings.emailStep3: Recognised data appears as a draft in the table below
settings.emailStep4: Review the data and accept it with a single click
settings.emailRequiresKey: Requires a configured OpenAI API key
settings.emailNoneHint: Incoming emails will appear here automatically.
settings.emailNoParsedData: No structured data recognised (confidence too low).
settings.emailPrivacy: Email contents are sent to OpenAI for analysis. Only structured data (order numbers, quantities, prices) are stored in Zentory. Raw email texts are not permanently retained after processing.
settings.roleCreateDialogDesc: Name the role and set its permissions.
settings.roleSystemLocked: Permissions for this system role cannot be changed
settings.roleEditReadonly: This system role is read-only. Permissions cannot be changed.
settings.roleEditDesc: Adjust the permissions for this role.
settings.roleOrgLoadError: Organisation data could not be loaded
settings.sessEndAllDesc: {count} other session(s) will be signed out immediately. Only your current session will remain active.

portals.vendorAccessDesc: Vendors can view, confirm orders and leave notes.
portals.customerAccessDesc: Customers can track commissions and leave comments.

tooltips.materialMinStock: Minimum stock: a warning is displayed when the threshold is reached.
tooltips.materialBarcode: EAN/GTIN barcode. Scan the product barcode for automatic identification.
tooltips.stockSafetyFactor: Safety factor: 1.5 = 50% buffer above the calculated minimum stock.
tooltips.scannerKeyboardWedge: Keyboard wedge: the scanner 'types' the barcode as keyboard input.
tooltips.materialUnit: Unit of measure for this material (e.g. pcs, m, kg, litre).
tooltips.toolStatus: Current status: Available, On loan, In maintenance or Defective.
tooltips.toolCalibration: Next calibration date. Overdue calibrations are marked in red.
tooltips.orderAutoReorder: Automatic reorder when minimum stock is reached.
tooltips.timeTrackingBillable: Billable hours are included in the monthly report.
tooltips.timeTrackingRate: Hourly rate in CHF for billing.
tooltips.deliveryOverdue: Deliveries that have exceeded the expected delivery date.
tooltips.deliveryCarrier: Swiss carriers: Post, DHL, DPD, Planzer, Camion Transport.
tooltips.stockLookbackDays: Analysis period: how many days of consumption data are used for the calculation.
tooltips.settingsWebhook: Webhooks send HTTP notifications to external systems on changes.
tooltips.settingsRbac: Role-based access control: define who can see and edit what.
tooltips.settingsApiKey: API key for integration with external systems (ERP, accounting).
tooltips.portalVendor: Supplier portal: your suppliers can view and confirm orders.
tooltips.portalCustomer: Customer portal: your customers can track commission progress.
tooltips.portalExpiry: After expiry, the token link can no longer be used.
tooltips.csvExport: Export as CSV file (semicolon-separated, UTF-8 with BOM for Excel compatibility).
tooltips.bulkActions: Select multiple entries with checkboxes for bulk actions.

stockAdjust.title: Min/Max Auto-Adjust
stockAdjust.pageDescription: Automatic calculation of optimal minimum and maximum stock based on consumption data
stockAdjust.configDescription: Settings for automatic calculation. Applies to all enabled materials.
stockAdjust.lookbackDaysDesc: Number of days for consumption analysis (7-365)
stockAdjust.safetyFactorDesc: Multiplier for safety stock (1.0 = no buffer, 2.0 = double buffer)
stockAdjust.noSettingsHint: Enable Auto-Adjust for materials via the material detail page.
stockAdjust.minStockFormula: Avg. daily consumption × lead time × safety factor
stockAdjust.reorderPointFormula: Minimum stock + (Avg. daily consumption × lead time)
stockAdjust.calculationNote: Lead time is automatically taken from supplier prices (fallback: 7 days). Consumption is based on withdrawals (type "out") in the configured lookback period.

geofences.title: Geofences
geofences.minRadius: Radius must be at least 10 meters.

beacons.title: Beacons

shiftHandover.selectShiftDesc: Choose date and shift time for the handover.
shiftHandover.emailSuccess: Shift handover was sent successfully by email.
shiftHandover.stockChangesDesc: All inbound/outbound, transfers and corrections during the shift.
shiftHandover.noStockChanges: No stock changes in this shift.
shiftHandover.toolBookingsDesc: Checkouts and returns during the shift.
shiftHandover.noToolBookings: No tool bookings in this shift.
shiftHandover.openOrdersDesc: Orders with status "Ordered" — not yet received.
shiftHandover.notesDesc: Free text field for handover to the next shift. Included in PDF export and email.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.greetingDescription: Ask me about your stock levels, tools, orders or let me perform actions for you.
aiChat.suggestedPrompt1: Which materials are below reorder level?
aiChat.suggestedPrompt3: Create an order for missing material
aiChat.suggestedPrompt4: What is the current stock level?
aiChat.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Always verify responses.

welcome.title: Welcome to Zentory!
welcome.description: We will show you the key areas of the application. The tour takes just a minute.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.description: Use the sidebar to access all areas: materials, tools, reports and more.

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Manage your entire material stock with storage locations, reorder levels and expiry dates.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Keep track of all tools, who has them and when they are expected back.

timeTracking.title: Time Tracking
timeTracking.description: Record working hours and assign them to projects or commissions.

deliveries.title: Delivery Tracking
deliveries.description: Track incoming deliveries and compare expected vs. actual quantities.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Generate reports on stock levels, tool utilisation and material consumption.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customise your company profile, team members and integrations.

finish.title: Let's go!
finish.description: You now know the key areas. Explore the app and start managing your inventory.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Stock statistics, tool utilization and material consumption at a glance.
analytics.stockMovementsDesc: Daily in and outbound in the selected period
analytics.noStockMovements: No stock movements in the selected period
analytics.toolUtilizationDesc: Checked-out vs. available tools per group
analytics.top10MaterialsDesc: Most moved materials in the selected period (number of bookings)
analytics.noMovements: No movements in the selected period

anomalies.title: Anomaly Detection
anomalies.description: Statistical analysis of stock movements from the last 7 days
anomalies.noAnomaliesDesc: Stock movements from the last 7 days are unremarkable.
anomalies.zScore: Quantities deviating more than 2.5 standard deviations from the mean are flagged as anomalous.
anomalies.offHoursDesc: Bookings before 06:00, after 22:00 or on weekends.
anomalies.consumptionSpikeDesc: Daily consumption greater than 3x the moving average (last 7 days).
anomalies.bulkWithdrawalDesc: Single transaction greater than 5x the average single withdrawal.
anomalies.baselinePeriod: Baseline period for statistics: last 30 days. This detection may contain false alarms.

forecasting.title: Demand Forecast
forecasting.description: AI-powered demand forecast and reorder suggestions for all active materials.
forecasting.materialsCount: {displayed} of {total} materials · Last 90 days consumption data

supplyChain.orderPipelineDesc: Current distribution of all orders by status

supplyChain.supplierPerformanceDesc: Order volume, delivery times and ratings of top suppliers

utilization.title: Equipment Utilization

utilization.avgUtilizationDesc: Across all tools in the period
utilization.totalBookingHoursDesc: Total rental time in the period
utilization.top10Desc: Utilization rate in % ({period} days, based on 8h workday)
utilization.tipText: Tools with less than 10% utilization could be sold or shared. Regularly check whether rarely used equipment is still needed.

maintenanceAi.title: AI Maintenance Prediction
maintenanceAi.description: Predictive maintenance analysis based on booking history and condition data
maintenanceAi.noToolDataDesc: Create tools and record bookings to get maintenance predictions.
maintenanceAi.riskDistributionDesc: Distribution of tools by risk score
maintenanceAi.howItWorks: How does the AI prediction work?
maintenanceAi.howItWorksDesc: The AI prediction is based on historical booking data and condition reports. The following factors are considered:
maintenanceAi.factor3: Condition trend from checklist results (linear regression)

consolidated.title: Consolidated Report
consolidated.singleOrgDesc: The consolidated view is available once you are a member of more than one organization.

inventoryCount.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
inventoryCount.createDesc: Name the inventory count and optionally select a location. Current stock will be automatically used as expected stock.

supplierDetail.noRatingsDesc: Add your first rating for this supplier.

materialRequest.successDesc: An admin will review and approve your request.

scale.bluetoothUnavailable: Web Bluetooth not available. Please use Google Chrome.

signature.confirmDesc: Commission {number} - Please confirm receipt with signature.

aiPrivacy.notice: Your data is sent directly to OpenAI. Zentory does not store chat histories. You use your own API key.
aiPrivacy.detailP1: AI requests are processed through your personal OpenAI API key. We only act as an intermediary and do not store your messages or responses on our servers.
aiPrivacy.detailP2: OpenAI's privacy policy applies to the processing of your data.

signup.readyDesc: Create account, invite team, register items - and everyone knows where everything is.

landing.heroSub:
Tools, materials, vehicle stock and keys —
all in one app. For trades and service teams
across Switzerland.
landing.heroNote: — No credit card · Setup in 5 minutes
landing.vpAllInOneDesc: Materials, tools, keys — one app, no more spreadsheets.
landing.vpLocationsDesc: Warehouses, vehicles and job sites always in sight — no guessing.
landing.vpMobileDesc: From the office or on the job site — works on any device.
landing.vpTraceabilityDesc: Who moved what, when and where? The history always has the answer.
landing.featInvDesc: Materials, tools, keys — all in one place. EAN lookup from 8 databases with over 100M products.
landing.featWrkDesc: Check-in/out, maintenance calendar, calibration, checklists and complete booking history.
landing.featLfgDesc: Kanban board with drag & drop. Swiss carriers: Post, DHL, DPD, Planzer. Tracking links included.
landing.featStoDesc: Warehouses, vehicles, job sites — GPS map, floor plan view and geofencing for auto check-in.
landing.featOrdDesc: Shopping cart, order items, supplier prices and automatic reorder when stock falls below threshold.
landing.featZeiDesc: Live timer, hourly rates, weekly reports and CSV export. Assignable to projects and commissions.
landing.howStep1Desc: Sign up in under a minute. No credit card required.
landing.howStep2Desc: Invite employees, set up locations, add items and tools.
landing.howStep3Desc: Make bookings, check stock, trigger orders — from day one.
landing.calcDesc: Lost tools, search time, duplicate orders — these costs never appear on an invoice. Calculate your annual loss.
landing.calcResultLabel: Your annual loss from search time
landing.scanDesc: Over 100 million products instantly recognised — food, building materials, medicines, chemicals, cosmetics and more. No manual typing.
landing.scanCatOtherDesc: If it has a barcode, we recognise it
landing.scanCtaSub: Included in subscription · No extra cost · Unlimited scans
landing.trustDesc: Zentory stores all data exclusively on servers in Switzerland. Fully compliant with the revised Data Protection Act (nDSG).
landing.migDesc: Whether Excel, bexio, PROFFIX or SAP — your data is imported in minutes. Our import wizard guides you step by step.
landing.migAiDesc: Columns are automatically detected and mapped to the correct fields. Manual mapping is always possible.
landing.perDesc: Plug in, connect, go — no drivers, no configuration. Zentory supports all common warehouse peripherals.
landing.perPrinterDesc: Zebra ZPL, Brother QL — print barcode labels
landing.perRfidDesc: UHF RFID for pallets & containers (Zebra, Impinj)
landing.priceProDesc: For growing businesses with full equipment.
landing.ctaDesc: 14 days free — no credit card, no commitment.

onboarding.welcomeMessage: Welcome! Set up your organisation in a few steps.
onboarding.step1Desc: Enter your company details. You can adjust these later in settings.
onboarding.noTemplateAvailable: No template available for this industry.
onboarding.templateApplyDesc: We found a matching template for {industry}. You can start right away.
onboarding.templateAppliedDesc: The industry template has been set up successfully. You can adjust all entries at any time.
onboarding.step2Desc: Create your first warehouse or location. You can add more locations at any time.
onboarding.step3Desc: Add your most common materials. You can skip this step and add materials later.
onboarding.step4Desc: Invite team members to your organisation. Existing users are added directly, new ones receive an invitation link.
onboarding.doneDesc: Your organisation is set up. You can now start recording your inventory.

support.pageSubtitle: Have a question, found a bug, or have an idea? We are happy to help.
support.formDescription: Report a bug, request a feature, or ask a question.
support.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem or your idea in as much detail as possible...
support.submitSuccess: Thank you! Your feedback has been submitted successfully.
support.faqDescription: Answers to the most commonly asked questions.
support.faqPasswordQ: How do I reset my password?
support.faqPasswordA: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page. You will receive an email with a reset link. Alternatively, you can change your password in Settings under 'Security'.
support.faqInviteQ: How do I invite team members?
support.faqInviteA: Go to Settings, then Team and click 'Invite member'. Enter the email address and choose the desired role (Member, Admin). The invited person will receive an email with an invitation link.
support.faqImportQ: How do I import data from Excel?
support.faqImportA: Navigate to Tools & Print, then Data Import. Upload your Excel or CSV file and map the columns to the corresponding fields. Zentory supports automatic column mapping.
support.faqBarcodeQ: How do I connect a barcode scanner?
support.faqBarcodeA: Zentory supports standard USB and Bluetooth barcode scanners. Connect the scanner and start scanning — the search field automatically recognizes barcode input. In the mobile app, you can also use the camera.
support.faqLanguageQ: How do I change the language?
support.faqLanguageA: Go to Settings and select your preferred language under 'Language'. Zentory supports German, English, French, and Italian.
support.faqDsgvoQ: How do I export my data (GDPR)?
support.faqDsgvoA: Under Settings, then Privacy, you can request a complete export of your data in JSON format. This includes all personal data and inventory data of your organization.
support.faqContactA: Use the form on this page, write to support@zentory.ch, or use the chat button in the bottom right corner. We typically respond within 24 hours.
support.faqRequirementsA: Zentory runs in any modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). The mobile app requires iOS 16+ or Android 13+. A stable internet connection is recommended.
